text:
[COMMIT - Commit by Samata Bag]
feat: add authentication routing and refine UI typography

- Add login/signup/forgot-password route handling
- Update global font stack to Geist and Instrument Sans
- Improve UI font weights and text styling consistency

[COMMIT - Commit by Samata Bag]
rebrand: rename project to CodeStory

Update application branding, UI labels, and user-facing copy from "Knowledge Time Machine" to "CodeStory". Also, clarify pipeline stage descriptions for improved UX.

[COMMIT - Commit by Samata Bag]
feat: enhance timeline UI and landing page design

- Integrate AiReportPanel and add advanced filtering to InteractiveTimeline
- Revamp LandingPage with motion effects and spotlight cards
- Expand ConnectorIntegrations with OAuth simulator and state management
- Update UI icons and layout components across dashboard modules

[COMMIT - Commit by Samata Bag]
refactor: rebrand forensic terminology to AI-focused language

Update UI copy and system instructions to use more standard AI-assistant terminology, shifting focus from "forensics" to general knowledge exploration and history search.

[COMMIT - Commit by Samata Bag]
feat: refactor architecture and UI components

- Modularize server routes
- Add dashboard, landing, and evidence pages
- Expand UI components with advanced event icons
- Implement repository management and ingestion logic

[COMMIT - Commit by Samata Bag]
feat: implement core architecture for Knowledge Time Machine

Initialize project structure with React, Vite, Express, and Google GenAI integration. Added base UI components, mock data presets, and local development configuration.

[COMMIT - Commit by Samata Bag]
Initial commit
